input_text: Baby bears eat no berries. "Riga is not in America. The elephant was cool. Catholics can not disappear. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Tallinn is in Estonia with a probability 90 percent. If John wrote a report, then Bill did too. All the boxes are red except for the small one. Sandra travelled to the hallway. Mike is very big. The city was destroyed. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. The horse kept in the stable was calm. The cup filled with water fell. The road leading to the village was narrow.
